name: Coal Miner's Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti according to directions on package.
2. In a separate pan, cook and stir garlic and bacon in olive oil until the bacon is crisp. Remove from heat and drain.
3. In a bowl, mix eggs, 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese, Romano cheese, parsley, and 1/2 tsp pepper.
4. Return the cooked spaghetti to the pan over very low heat. Quickly toss the spaghetti with the egg mixture.
5. Add the bacon and olive oil mixture, stirring gently.
6. Top with additional Parmesan cheese and serve with pepper.
